safe_zone_audit.verdict: PASS -- all active scenes use pad-top/pad-bottom via flex-center; no content extends below y=1100, well inside the y=1280 dead-zone boundary

findings.summary: First-frame hero headline at 132px is below the 140px typography minimum and pain-hook wording provides no product-name anchor for YouTube auto-thumbnail.
findings.evidence: font-size:132px. Hero-slam minimum=140px. Headline reads as a pain hook with no ast-grep topic anchor. Open-topic-then-pivot pattern requires tool named at t=0.
findings.fix: Bump to 140px minimum (160px recommended). Apply open-topic-then-pivot: show ast-grep at t=0 as topic lockup, let pain hook take over at approximately t=2.5s.

findings.summary: Final frame (t=107.6 to t=130) has no dominant topic statement at or above 120px. Matches the solo-CTA-on-empty-background BLOCKER pattern.
findings.evidence: .url=56px .cta-question=48px .subscribe=38px .lede=48px. None reaches 120px. 5-element last-frame checklist requires dominant topic >=120px plus visual anchor plus brand chrome >=40px.
findings.fix: Add a topic headline at 140-160px to scene-cta.html. Add ast-grep logo as visual anchor. All 5 mandatory elements must coexist on the final held frame.

findings.summary: Brand wordmark at 24px -- below 32px overline/mono minimum.
findings.evidence: font-size:24px on #top-banner-wordmark (JetBrains Mono uppercase letter-spacing:8px). Overline/mono moustache minimum is 32px.
font-size:30px on .pretitle (JetBrains Mono uppercase). Overline/mono minimum is 32px.
font-size:28px on .kicker (JetBrains Mono uppercase). Overline/mono minimum is 32px.

findings.summary: Verdict-tail descriptor at 28px -- below 30px list-item descriptor minimum.
findings.evidence: font-size:28px on .verdict-tail. Role: list-item descriptor. Minimum is 30px.

findings.summary: Chart row labels at 28px -- below 30px list-item descriptor minimum.
findings.evidence: font-size:28px on .label (JetBrains Mono uppercase). Role: primary list-item label. Unreadable on phone.
findings.fix: Bump to 32px minimum. Shorten label text if layout becomes tight.

findings.summary: Comparison card ribbon badges at 22px -- below 32px caption-pill minimum.
findings.evidence: font-size:22px on .ribbon (grep / ast-grep card badges). Role: caption pill. Minimum is 32px.

findings.summary: Process-flow node subtitle lines at 24px -- below 30px list-item descriptor minimum.
findings.evidence: font-size:24px on .node .sub. Role: list-item descriptor. Minimum is 30px.
font-size:30px on .kicker (JetBrains Mono uppercase). Overline/mono minimum is 32px.

findings.summary: Subscribe CTA pill at 38px -- below 44px CTA pill minimum.
findings.evidence: font-size:38px on .subscribe. CTA pill minimum is 44px.

findings.summary: CTA scene kicker at 30px -- below 32px minimum.
No visual anchor (ast-grep logo or badge >=40px tall) visible at t=0. Mandatory element 2 of first-frame thumbnail spec is absent.
findings.evidence: scene-marker at t=0 shows .pretitle (30px) plus .headline (132px pain hook) plus .subline (38px). Top-banner wordmark is 24px -- below 40px logo-height requirement.
findings.fix: Add ast-grep logo SVG or styled badge (height >=40px) visible from t=0 with no entrance animation delay.

findings.summary: Source URL chip label at 14px and text at 18px -- both far below 32px minimum.
findings.evidence: font-size:14px on .source-url-label; font-size:18px on .source-url-text. Chip correctly repositioned to top:140px but text renders at approximately 5-6px on device.
findings.fix: Bump .source-url-label to 22px, .source-url-text to 24-28px. Or consolidate to single line at 28px.

findings.summary: Code window filename at 20px -- below 32px minimum. Filename dag-executor.test.ts is key scene context.
findings.evidence: font-size:20px on .filename. 20px is unreadable on phone.
findings.fix: Bump to 28-32px. Truncate path if it overflows the titlebar at that size.

findings.summary: All 8 scene-wrapper mount divs are missing class=clip, data-duration, data-width, and data-height.
findings.evidence: Scene wrappers have data-start and data-track-index but lack class=clip, data-duration, data-width=1080, data-height=1920. Per sub-composition-wiring.md all four are required.
findings.fix: Add class=clip, data-width=1080, data-height=1920, and data-duration to every scene wrapper. Approx durations: scene-marker=11.0, scene-string-literal=15.3, scene-chart=16.7, scene-stat=14.9, scene-compare=13.4, scene-process-flow=19.3, scene-code-block=17.0, scene-cta=22.4.

findings.summary: Code body lines at 32px mono -- at caption-pill floor but well below URL/mono technical minimum of 56px.
findings.evidence: font-size:32px on .line (JetBrains Mono). Narration covers content so reading dependency is reduced. 32px renders at approximately 11px on phone.
findings.fix: Bump to 36px. Trim code lines if needed.
